summary: Comprehensive testing of Tax Office CRM Portal completed successfully. All backend APIs working (100% pass rate), frontend UI fully functional with bilingual support, authentication working, all portal pages accessible and operational.

design_issues.issue: Services currently display only in English, not showing Spanish translations despite bilingual data being available in backend
Templates page shows 0 template elements despite backend having 4 templates available
Create client button not found in UI (expected 'New Client' button)

passed_tests: Backend API: All 23 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Public booking page: Full 4-step wizard working with service selection, calendar, time slots, contact form
Login authentication: Admin and staff login working with proper role-based access
Dashboard: Stats cards displaying correct data, recent appointments and cases showing
Services page: 5 services displaying with proper card layout
Clients page: Client list with 7 clients showing, proper table format
Appointments page: 12 appointments displaying in table format
Cases page: Service requests showing with status badges and checklist progress (3/4, 2/3, 0/4 completion ratios)
Calendar page: Calendar view component loaded successfully
Staff page: 3 staff members displayed with roles (Admin: Maria Rodriguez, Staff: John Smith, Ana Garcia)
Settings page: Business settings form with 12 form elements, bilingual business names
Language toggle: Working in both booking page and portal navbar
Admin-only access: Staff and Settings pages properly restricted to admin users
Bilingual support: UI switching between English and Spanish correctly
